semantics.title: Stablecoin Trust Verification Standard
semantics.summary: Defines deterministic, machine-verifiable requirements for the trust basis of fiat-referenced, reserve-backed stablecoins, covering supply, liabilities, reserves, custody, redemption, and independent attestation. It determines whether a stablecoin satisfies those requirements at a specified verification point. It does not predict market price, does not guarantee against de-pegging, and does not certify legal compliance in any jurisdiction.
applicability: Fiat-referenced, reserve-backed stablecoins that promise redemption

notes.intent: Derived machine representation. The frozen PDF remains the sole Normative Artifact.
